_meta.note: Restructured to canonical pattern: toolCallId-keyed narration BEFORE userMessage-only tool-emit fixtures, first-match-wins. Previously used hasToolResult:true/false gates which break on the multi-prompt AAPL turn (the Tokyo tool result from turn 1 makes hasToolResult permanently true).

fixtures._comment: Custom catchall turn 1 follow-up: after get_weather tool result. Keyed by toolCallId so it only fires on the post-tool leg; ordered before the tool-emit fixture below for first-match-wins.

match.userMessage: Forecast Tokyo through the wildcard renderer

response.content: Tokyo is 22°C and partly cloudy — rendered through the custom wildcard catchall.

fixtures._comment: Custom catchall turn 1: weather in Tokyo — emit get_weather tool call. The custom wildcard renderer fires for this tool. Matches on userMessage+context alone (no hasToolResult gate); the toolCallId narration above wins after the tool result arrives.

match.userMessage: Forecast Tokyo through the wildcard renderer

fixtures._comment: Custom catchall turn 2 follow-up: after get_stock_price tool result. Keyed by toolCallId; must come before the tool-emit fixture below.

match.userMessage: Quote AAPL through the wildcard renderer

response.content: AAPL is trading at $338.37, down 2.96% on the day — rendered through the custom wildcard catchall.

fixtures._comment: Custom catchall turn 2: AAPL stock price — emit get_stock_price tool call. Both this and get_weather must render through the same custom-wildcard-card testid. No hasToolResult gate (the Tokyo tool result from turn 1 makes hasToolResult permanently true).

match.userMessage: Quote AAPL through the wildcard renderer
